message:
feat(storage): tick 137 saved-search cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Sixteenth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 6 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the saved-search cluster.

New siblings:
- insert_saved_search_with_cx (write path)
- update_saved_search_run_with_cx (write path)
- update_saved_search_schedule_with_cx (write path)
- delete_saved_search_with_cx (write path)
- get_saved_search_by_name_with_cx (read path)
- list_saved_searches_with_cx (read path)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick137_saved_search_cluster_roundtrip` exercises
all 6 siblings end-to-end against a fresh SQLite DB — insert, fetch
by name, list, update run metadata, update schedule, delete.
Verified via fork bypass: 484/484 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 70 + 6 = 76 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 64 legacy methods still lack a sibling; saved-search
cluster now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
